role_title: Security Product Lead –  Enterprise & Identity Security
secondary_archetype: AI Product Manager / Security Product Lead

level_signals: 7+ years of experience in cybersecurity, risk management, or technology strategy roles
Responsible for multi-year strategy and roadmap ownership
Influences without direct authority across executive and cross-functional stakeholders

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, or related discipline.
7+ years of experience in cybersecurity, risk management, or technology strategy roles.
Demonstrated experience in Identity & Access Management (IAM), Privileged Access Management (PAM), Enterprise Security, Data Security, or AI/ML Security domains.
Demonstrated experience building and managing strategic roadmaps tied to measurable outcomes.
Strong understanding of security frameworks, identity protocols (e.g., OAuth, SAML, SCIM), and enterprise risk.
Understanding of AI/ML concepts and associated security risks, including data provenance, model integrity, and adversarial machine learning.
Strong product mindset with ability to translate strategy into execution.
Experience working in matrixed organizations with cross-functional stakeholders.
Strong analytical, communication, and executive presentation skills.

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska

scope.surface: Enterprise & Identity Security — covering IAM, PAM, Authentication, AI Security, Data Security, Infrastructure Security
core_responsibilities: Develop and maintain a multi-year strategy and roadmap for Enterprise Security, Identity Security (IAM, PAM, Authentication), and AI Security capabilities.
Align roadmap priorities with enterprise risk objectives, regulatory requirements, and evolving threat landscape.
Define the value proposition and service model for Enterprise Security and Identity Management capabilities.
Establish product requirements and roadmaps for Data Security capabilities, including DLP, data classification, data encryption.
Own the portfolio view of Enterprise, Identity, and AI Security initiatives within the broader security strategy.
Structure and manage strategic programs required to deliver roadmap objectives.
Manage cross-functional dependencies across Engineering, IT, HR, Legal, and other stakeholders.
Monitor industry trends in enterprise architecture security, identity threats, and AI-specific threats.
Incorporate lessons learned from security audits and penetration tests into roadmap evolution.

green_flags: Role sits within a named team (Security Strategy & Delivery), suggesting established structure
Clear scope across IAM, PAM, AI Security, and Data Security — not vague
Explicit mention of measurable outcomes and KPIs as part of role expectations
SoFi is a national bank with significant regulatory accountability, giving the role real strategic weight
Role explicitly calls out 'influence without direct authority' — signals IC career path without people management burden
red_flags: Compensation range is not disclosed despite the JD stating 'The base pay range for this role is listed below' — range appears missing from the posted content
Location type is unclear — no city, hybrid, or remote policy specified in the JD body (only Hawaii/Alaska excluded)
No information on team size or reporting structure
